test_cases.description: cli_main initializes CliContext with default config path ./ledger.yaml when no flag or env var is set
test_cases.expected_output_description: CliContext attached to click.Context.obj with config_path as absolute path ending in ledger.yaml
assertions: config_path is an absolute resolved path string

test_cases.description: cli_main resolves config_path from --config flag
cli_main resolves config_path from LEDGER_CONFIG env var when no flag given
test_cases.expected_output_description: CliContext with config_path from env var
assertions: config_path equals the LEDGER_CONFIG env var value

test_cases.description: cli_main catches KeyboardInterrupt and exits with code 130
cli_main catches unhandled LedgerError and exits with the error's exit_code
test_cases.expected_error: LedgerError caught at group level, exit with its exit_code

test_cases.description: cmd_init creates ledger.yaml scaffold at config_path
cmd_init fails when ledger.yaml already exists and --force not set
assertions: Error message mentions file already exists

test_cases.description: cmd_init fails when process lacks write permission
cmd_backend_add registers a new backend successfully
test_cases.expected_output_description: Exit code 0, success message on stderr

test_cases.description: cmd_backend_add fails when config is not loaded
cmd_backend_add fails when backend id already exists
cmd_backend_add fails when owner component_id is not registered
cmd_schema_add ingests a valid schema YAML file
cmd_schema_add fails when path does not exist
cmd_schema_add fails when file is not valid YAML
cmd_schema_add fails when YAML does not conform to schema spec
cmd_schema_add fails when config is not loaded
cmd_schema_show displays full backend schema
test_cases.expected_output_description: CommandResult with schema data, exit code 0

test_cases.description: cmd_schema_show displays schema filtered to one table
assertions: registry.show_schema called with backend_id and table

test_cases.description: cmd_schema_show fails when backend id is not registered
cmd_schema_show fails when table does not exist in backend schema
cmd_schema_validate returns success when no error-severity violations
test_cases.expected_output_description: CommandResult with empty violations, exit code 0

test_cases.description: cmd_schema_validate returns exit code 0 when only warnings exist
test_cases.expected_output_description: Exit code 0, violations present but no errors

test_cases.description: cmd_schema_validate returns ALL violations not just the first
cmd_schema_validate returns exit code 1 when error-severity violations exist
cmd_schema_validate fails when no schemas are registered
cmd_migrate_plan creates a migration plan with no gate violations

mock_dependencies.migration.plan_migration: returns plan with no error violations

test_cases.description: cmd_migrate_plan fails when migration file does not exist
cmd_migrate_plan fails when SQL is unparseable
cmd_migrate_plan fails when component_id is not registered
cmd_migrate_plan returns exit code 1 with error-severity gate violations

mock_dependencies.migration.plan_migration: returns plan with error-severity gate violations

assertions: All gate violations returned with severity levels

test_cases.description: cmd_migrate_plan returns all gate violations not just the first
assertions: All gate violations included in result

test_cases.description: cmd_migrate_approve approves a pending plan
assertions: migration.approve_migration called with plan_id and review_id

test_cases.description: cmd_migrate_approve fails when plan_id does not exist
cmd_migrate_approve fails when plan is already approved
cmd_migrate_approve fails when plan has unresolved error-severity violations
cmd_export exports contracts in pact format
test_cases.expected_output_description: CommandResult with exported data, exit code 0

test_cases.description: cmd_export filters by component_id
cmd_export fails when no data to export
cmd_export fails when component filter matches nothing
cmd_mock generates mock data rows
test_cases.expected_output_description: CommandResult with 10 mock rows, exit code 0

test_cases.description: cmd_mock with same seed produces same output
test_cases.expected_output_description: Same data on repeated calls with same seed
assertions: Output is deterministic when seed is provided

test_cases.description: cmd_mock fails when backend is not registered
cmd_mock fails when table does not exist
cmd_mock warns but does not crash when Arbiter is unreachable for canary purpose
test_cases.expected_output_description: Warning on stderr, does not crash

test_cases.description: cmd_serve starts server and blocks
cmd_serve shuts down cleanly on KeyboardInterrupt with exit code 130
cmd_serve fails when port is already bound
require_config loads valid config from YAML file
test_cases.expected_output_description: ctx.config is a valid LedgerConfig instance

test_cases.description: require_config raises LedgerError when config file does not exist
require_config raises LedgerError when YAML is invalid
test_cases.setup_description: Create file with invalid YAML content

test_cases.description: require_config raises LedgerError when YAML does not conform to LedgerConfig schema
test_cases.setup_description: Create valid YAML but with wrong schema

test_cases.description: format_output returns valid JSON string for json format
format_output returns valid YAML string for yaml format
format_output returns human-readable string for text format
format_output raises error for unserializable data
format_output handles None data gracefully in text format
render_violations formats violations into readable string
test_cases.expected_output_description: Colored string with all violations grouped by severity
assertions: Grouped by severity: errors first, warnings, info

test_cases.description: render_violations handles empty violation list
render_violations omits ANSI codes when use_color is False
test_cases.expected_output_description: Plain text without ANSI escape codes
assertions: No ANSI escape sequences in output

test_cases.description: render_violations groups errors first, then warnings, then info
CLI subcommands only dispatch to domain modules with no business logic
assertions: Domain module function called exactly once

test_cases.description: Data output goes to stdout, status/errors go to stderr
Config resolution order: --config flag > LEDGER_CONFIG env > ./ledger.yaml
assertions: Flag takes precedence over env var
Env var takes precedence over default

test_cases.description: LedgerError violations are never truncated
Exit codes match enum values: 0=success, 1=domain, 3=config, 130=interrupt
Schema YAML is stored verbatim without normalization
assertions: YAML content passed to registry unchanged

test_cases.description: cmd_init is the only command that works without loaded config
When Arbiter is unreachable during canary mock, CLI warns but does not crash
assertions: Exit code is not 1 from the arbiter issue alone

test_cases.description: cmd_backend_add accepts all BackendType values
assertions: All backend types accepted without error

test_cases.description: cmd_export accepts all ExportFormat values
assertions: All export formats accepted without error

test_cases.description: format_output handles all OutputFormat values
assertions: All output formats produce valid output

test_cases.description: Root --help displays usage information
ledger init --help displays init usage
ledger backend add --help displays usage
ledger schema add --help displays usage
ledger schema show --help displays usage
ledger schema validate --help displays usage
ledger migrate plan --help displays usage
ledger migrate approve --help displays usage
ledger export --help displays usage
ledger mock --help displays usage
ledger serve --help displays usage
Integration: successful command returns exit code 0
Integration: domain error returns exit code 1
Integration: config error returns exit code 3
Integration: KeyboardInterrupt returns exit code 130
Integration: --verbose flag increases output detail
assertions: Verbose output includes more detail than non-verbose

test_cases.description: Integration: --config flag overrides env var and default
assertions: Config path from flag is used

test_cases.description: Integration: LEDGER_CONFIG env var used when no flag
assertions: Config path from env var is used

test_cases.description: Integration: default ./ledger.yaml used when no flag or env
cmd_mock with count=0 generates empty result
format_output with empty dict data in json format
assertions: Returns valid JSON for empty dict

test_cases.description: render_violations summary line shows correct counts per severity
assertions: Summary shows 2 errors, 1 warning, 1 info for mixed list
